mapper.select: SELECT * FROM ( SELECT w.wishlist_id AS wishlistId, 'RECIPE' AS type, w.recipe_id AS recipeId, NULL AS aiRecipeId, r.title AS title, r.image_url AS thumbnailUrl, r.cook_time AS cookTime, w.created_at AS createdAt FROM wishlist w JOIN recipe r ON r.recipe_id = w.recipe_id WHERE w.member_id = #{memberId} AND w.recipe_id IS NOT NULL UNION ALL SELECT w.wishlist_id, 'AI', NULL, w.ai_recipe_id, a.title, NULL, a.cook_time, w.created_at FROM wishlist w JOIN ai_recipe a ON a.ai_recipe_id = w.ai_recipe_id WHERE w.member_id = #{memberId} AND w.ai_recipe_id IS NOT NULL ) merged ORDER BY merged.createdAt DESC, merged.wishlistId DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM wishlist WHERE member_id = #{memberId}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM wishlist WHERE member_id = #{memberId} AND recipe_id = #{recipeId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ai_recipe (member_id, title, summary, ingredients_json, steps_json, cook_time) VALUES (#{cmd.memberId}, #{cmd.title}, #{cmd.summary}, #{cmd.ingredientsJson}, #{cmd.stepsJson}, #{cmd.cookTime})
mapper.select: SELECT member_id FROM ai_recipe WHERE ai_recipe_id = #{aiRecipeId} LIMIT 1

SELECT ai_recipe_id AS aiRecipeId, member_id AS memberId, title, summary, ingredients_json AS ingredientsJson, steps_json AS stepsJson, cook_time AS cookTime, created_at AS createdAt FROM ai_recipe WHERE ai_recipe_id = #{aiRecipeId} LIMIT 1
